name: Chocolate Brownie Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the Golden Crisco Shortening, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla extract. Beat with an electric mixer on low speed for 1 minute or until creamy.
3. Add the beaten eggs.
4. In another bowl, mix together flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt. Gradually add to the creamed mixture alternately with milk, beating on low speed for about 1 minute, or just until blended.
5. Stir in nuts and chocolate chips.
6. Drop heaping spoonfuls (about 2 tablespoons per cookie) onto an ungreased baking sheet, leaving about 3 inches between cookies to allow spreading. Bake 6 to 9 at a time.
7. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes. The cookies will appear soft and moist when baked but firm up on cooling. Allow cooling for 2 minutes before transferring to a cooling rack. Makes approximately 3 dozen cookies. Smaller cookies can be made using 1 tablespoon of dough for each cookie.
